chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-35 0f2021 Date Order with signature of Judge For ' haaring of maln تaهع 220&2022 Mr Ihsan Ali Lund Baloch Advocate for the Petitioner Mr Shahid Hussain Jogi Advocate for Respondents No 3 & 4 Mr Ghulam Abbas Kuber, AAG 44 444 11444 Petitioner is employee of Town Committee Thari Mirwah has filed this petition for recovery of salary ٥٢٢٤3/5 amounting Rs.13,96,953/-. Learned Counsel for the Respondents No3 & undertakes that arrears would be paid to the petitioner in installmenty of Rs. 100,0OO/- per month Learned Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and this petition in the light of undertaking of learned Counsel for the Respondents is accordingly disposed ofin the above terms
